evaluator_feedback.summary: Independent Evaluator re-reviewed B001 strategy documents and found no blocking consistency defects. The five strategy docs are consistent on USD 100k-500k personal-account scope, low-frequency robust style, strategy hierarchy, allocation/risk limits, data/PIT requirements, Paper Trading gates, live-readiness gates, and AI usage boundaries. Prior B001 self-signoff reports remain invalid and are superseded by docs/test-reports/B001-independent-reverification-review-2026-05-12.md and docs/test-reports/B001-independent-reverification-signoff-2026-05-12.md.
